title: Social Player Mobs
description: Player mobs with behaviours, items / chest interactions and motives
body:
A player-mob designed for Dungoen Train, but can be used for any mods or games.

Player-mobs pick up items, open chests / barrels  and use armor stands to, swap out gear for upgrades.
Picks from different default skins.

They have different personalittes

- Aggressive (attacks players on sight)
- Shy (will run away from players, crouch to hide behind blocks)
- Friendly (will star at play and spam couch as friendly jesture and gives players things. If attacked, becomes aggressive, or shy)
- Passive (generally ignores players, will look super briefly at players occasionally. If attacked, becomes aggressive, or shy)
- Skeptical (will stare at the player for 1-5 seconds before continuing their tasks, will use shield or pull out weapon if player gets to close. If attacked, becomes aggressive, or shy)

# How to use

## Dungeon Train Survival
This mod is primiarly designed to be used with the [Dungeon Train](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-train) mod. It adds player based entities with different alignments to the train, that explore the train alongside you. Find them, befriend them, assist them, or fight them.


### Creative / Stand-alone
 - Search for "player" in creative items, to find the player egg to spawn in players and see how they interact or explore the world.

### Modding
See [the wiki](https://github.com/bh679/playermob-mc/wiki) for using this in your own mods / modpacks
